description_long: This house features a compact, square stone structure with a prominent, steeply pitched shingle dome roof topped by a decorative finial. The exterior walls are constructed from rough-hewn gray stone blocks, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. A wooden wraparound porch encircles the building, with a set of wooden steps leading up to the main entrance. The front door is centrally located and features a grid-like pattern, but there are no visible windows on any side of the house. The roof shingles are arranged in overlapping rows, and the porch planks are laid horizontally, adding texture and visual interest. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on durability and minimal ornamentation.
description: A small, stone house with a steep shingle dome roof, wraparound wooden porch, and a central front door, but no visible windows. The structure is rustic and compact, with a decorative finial atop the roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stone walls, shingle dome roof, and the wooden porch extending around the house; the steps and door are not visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central door with a grid pattern, wooden steps leading up to the porch, and the decorative roof finial.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the stone wall and shingle roof visible; the porch and steps are seen from the side, but no door or windows are present.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the stone wall, shingle dome roof, and wraparound porch, with no doors or windows visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door accessed by wooden steps, with a wraparound porch and no decorative columns or overhangs.
